name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.15.0 - DEV-CYCLE VISIBILITY. New PreToolUse(Skill) hook emits a one-line banner on every skill invocation showing which plugin@marketplace v? scope won the scope-resolution race. Eliminates the 'wrong-version-won-quietly' debug class: when a stale project-scope install shadows a newer user-scope one, you see it immediately, not after an hour of confused debugging. Carries forward survival-layer auto-install + state.json persistence from v4.14.x.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
